Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import os, sys
os.chdir\('C:/catalog'\)
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
for p in ['.env']:
    if os.path.exists\(p\):
        with open\(p\) as f:
            for line in f:
                line=line.strip\(\)
                if line and not line.startswith\('#'\) and '=' in line:
                    k,_,v=line.partition\('='\)
                    os.environ.setdefault\(k.strip\(\),v.strip\(\).strip\('\\"'\)\)
import gspread
from google.oauth2.service_account import Credentials
creds=Credentials.from_service_account_file\('scripts/credentials.json',scopes=['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets']\)
gc=gspread.authorize\(creds\)
ws=gc.open_by_key\(os.environ['GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID']\).worksheet\('Товары'\)
rows=ws.get_all_values\(\)
header=rows[0]
name_i=header.index\('Наименование'\)
cat_i=header.index\('Категория'\)
grp_i=header.index\('Группа'\)
print\('=== Строки 784-787 ==='\)
for i in range\(783,787\):
    r=rows[i]
    print\(f'{i+1} | {r[name_i][:45]} | кат={r[cat_i]} | гр={r[grp_i]}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Все товары Категория=Царский ==='\)
for i,r in enumerate\(rows[1:],2\):
    if r[cat_i]=='Царский':
        print\(f'{i} | {r[name_i][:50]} | гр={r[grp_i]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import subprocess, sys, os
r = subprocess.run\(['python', 'scripts/upload.py'], capture_output=True\)
lines = r.stderr.decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\).strip\(\).splitlines\(\)
for l in lines[-8:]:
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\(l+'\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('RC: '+str\(r.returncode\)+'\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\)
sys.stdout.buffer.flush\(\)
" 2>&1)
